sections.heading: Clinical Note
sections.section_value:
Chief Complaint
Right foot wound
History of Present Illness
The patient reports a wound on their right foot. He also reports that the sock sticks to the wound. The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports a wound. The patient reports foot pain. The patient reports that the sock sticks to the wound. The patient reports a wound. The patient reports foot pain.
Findings
Examination reveals a wound on the right foot.
Assessment
The patient has a problem.
Plan
The patient finished a course of medication yesterday. The patient completed a course of antibiotics. Follow up in four weeks if symptoms persist.
